chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
A permit issued under this subchapter is the only permit issued by the department under this chapter that may be used to transport fluid milk.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 623.406 (Permit Conditions) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(68), eff. September 1, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.426 — Exclusive Permit

A permit issued under this subchapter is the only permit issued by the department under this chapter that may be used to transport fluid milk.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 623.406 (Permit Conditions) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(68), eff. September 1, 2019.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 750 (S.B.1383), Sec. 2, eff. January 1, 2018.*
